items.headline: Live Updates: Thunder and Pistons Take 2-0 Series Lead
items.description: Updates, highlights and live scores for the Pistons-Cavaliers and Thunder-Lakers playoff matchups on Prime

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Cade Cunningham takes command as Pistons stake 2-0 series lead
items.description: Cade Cunningham drops 12 of his 25 points in the 4th, James Harden can't keep control & more from Detroit's Game 2 win.

items.headline: Reports: Knicks' OG Anunoby (strained hamstring) questionable for Game 3 vs. Sixers
items.description: Anunoby is reportedly day to day with the injury he suffered in Game 2 vs. Philadelphia.

items.headline: Hornets give coach Charles Lee a contract extension after 25-win improvement
items.description: The 25-win improvement represented the largest year-over-year win total improvement in franchise history.

items.headline: Hornets guard Brandon Miller out indefinitely after surgery to address left shoulder instability
items.description: Miller will be out indefinitely and additional updates on his status will be provided as appropriate, the Hornets announced Wednesday.

items.headline: The Athletic: Ajay Mitchell carries the dreams of his late father
items.description: After losing his father in December, this season took on more meaning for Oklahoma City's Ajay Mitchell: "I don't want to let him down."

items.headline: Pistons' Duncan Robinson named Bob Lanier Community Assist Award Winner for April
items.description: Duncan Robinson earns the award for his commitment to youth mental health and wellness, advocacy for stroke recovery support and more.

items.headline: Starting 5: Knicks survive, Spurs shine & a look at tonight's Game 2s
items.description: New York halts Philly for a 2-0 series edge, San Antonio ties its series with Minnesota and we look ahead to tonight's Game 2s.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Thunder-Lakers Game 2
items.description: The Lakers understand their playoff dilemma. They need to be near their best to win, and the defending champ Thunder do not.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Spurs respond to loss in opener with blowout win in Game 2
items.description: San Antonio shows intensity and resiliency from the opening tip to overwhelm Minnesota with a 133-95 home victory.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Knicks survive tense 4th quarter to take 2-0 lead over the 76ers
items.description: In a game featuring 25 lead changes, New York leans on a late 9-0 run to turn back Philadelphia 108-102 in Game 2.

items.headline: Anthony Edwards available for Timberwolves in Game 2 vs. Spurs
items.description: Edwards played 25 minutes and scored 18 points in the Timberwolves' 104-102 victory over San Antonio in Game 1.

items.headline: Recap: Knicks, Spurs win pivotal Game 2s in Conference Semifinals
items.description: Check out the best from Wednesday's action in the 2026 NBA Conference Semifinals with our live blog.

items.headline: Celtics' Brad Stevens still reconciling how season that had sudden title hopes ended so quickly
items.description: After finishing 2nd in the East, Boston's playoff run was stopped by Philadelphia in the 1st round.

items.headline: Bryson Graham is ready to take on the challenge of rebuilding the Bulls
items.description: Graham spent last season as Atlanta's Sr. VP of basketball operations after a 15-year run in New Orleans’ front office.
